task: Final monolith carve wave: drop last 5 files >1k LOC below the 1k threshold and verify meta-test passes

_rfecv_fit.py.notes: Original audit recommended deferring this single-method monolith; safe carve was only the validation prelude (~225 LOC) returning (X, y, signature, polars_ts_hint, skip). Behavioural-equivalence smoke test fits a real RFECV on synthetic data; rejects sample_weight length mismatch + NaN-in-y via the carved helper. Hit 826 LOC not <800 because the inner CV/elimination loop is too coupled to extract without behavioural risk (per audit warning).

neural/base.py.notes: PytorchLightningEstimator class stays in parent (tight-coupled 555 LOC per audit; not safe to split). _LightningRankZeroNoiseFilter side-effect attach loop runs at sibling import (idempotent guard preserved).

_ensembling_score.py.notes: score_ensemble (988 LOC body) is tight-coupled; only the upfront single-member / mixed-type / regression-RRF-filter / multi-level-OOF validation prelude could be safely lifted. Coupling across the gate-source-selection block + cross-target ensemble loop + per-flavour reduce is too high for safe further carving without behavioural-equivalence risk. Parent now under 1k LOC.

_phase_composite_post.py.notes: Already partially split (Wave 100 carved _run_composite_target_wrapping). _LagPredictDeployableModel class lifted to sibling. run_composite_post_processing body (~830 LOC) remains in parent because the cross-target ensemble loop's closure-captured state (>20 local variables for component pool, OOF gate, NNLS weights, fallbacks) does not survive a safe sibling extract without a FitState-style refactor that is out of scope for a behavioural-only carve.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Hit 826 LOC, not the ambitious <800 target
deviations_from_plan.rationale: Single-method monolith; the audit plan (monoliths-split.md section 'feature_selection/wrappers/_rfecv_fit.py (998 LOC)') explicitly warned that further intra-method phase extraction requires FitState dataclass + behavioural-equivalence tests (real refactor, not behavioural-only carve). The validation prelude extract was the safe minimum; remaining LOC is the deeply-nested cv loop + _eval_fold closure + scoring resolution. Sensor LOC budget set to <1000 to gate against future regression. Recommend dedicated PR with full RFECV biz_value coverage for the inner-loop carve.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Hit 950 LOC, not the ambitious <750 target
deviations_from_plan.rationale: Single 988-LOC function with deeply-nested closure-captured locals (gate source selection, K2/K>2 catastrophic checks, embedded for-loop over ensembling_methods, downstream votenrank leaderboard build). Carving streaming vs materialised dispatcher would require splitting the gate-selection + filter-decision state which is shared across the two paths. Validation prelude carve was the safe minimum.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Did not carve cross-target-ensemble loop to _phase_composite_post_xt_ensemble.py as plan suggested
deviations_from_plan.rationale: The cross-target loop body (lines ~280-990, ~710 LOC) shares state with run_composite_post_processing's outer namespace via 20+ closure locals (composite_specs_by_target_type, _train_pred_cache, models, metadata, _ce_strategy, dummy_baselines_config, etc). Safe extract would require a CrossTargetEnsembleContext dataclass + behavioural-equivalence test on a real composite suite (not synthetic) -- out of scope for this wave's budget. Parent already below 1k via _LagPredictDeployableModel carve.
